title: Add MLX heavy-share research harness for Parameter Golf
author: SoumilRathi

data.description: Shared-heavy / unique-light transformer family that reuses expensive core weights across depth while keeping small per-layer controls unique.
Local fixed-wallclock MLX screening support for research iteration under a training-time budget.
Faster local validation and export iteration support.
Additional research toggles for curriculum, residual routing, memory, and export experiments.

novel_contributions: Faster local validation / export iteration support
Research toggles for curriculum, residual routing, memory, and export experiments
A research harness intended to support compute grant application and remote validation
